assessor_1_raw:
## Independent Assessment 1 (Run 3): Temporal GNN for AML Detection

Design is sound. Chronological split, frozen graph, preprocessing on training only, equal tuning, appropriate primary metric, stratified analysis. No violations. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw:
## Independent Assessment 2 (Run 3): Temporal GNN for AML Detection

All design choices are correctly motivated. Frozen graph prevents leakage. Labels from closed investigations only — correct for AML ground truth. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw:
## Independent Assessment 3 (Run 3): Temporal GNN for AML Detection

Strong design. Temporal isolation is correct. Graph frozen appropriately. The primary metric choice (Precision@Recall) is operationally appropriate. Scope bounded correctly. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 3): eval_scenario_589

All three: defense_wins. Unanimous across all three runs.

Verdict: defense_wins
